microsoft_ft: Owned product vision and roadmap for Azure’s recovery validation domain, platformizing a 2-person operation into a self-service system that sustains **45+ annual resilience drills** and drove **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp).

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, writing technical requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria for self-service scheduling capabilities that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and transitioned execution to a scalable model.

Pioneered Azure’s first proactive resilience testing capability, prioritizing a quarterly backlog by complexity and impact to deliver a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing continuous validation.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating across partner, engineering, and business stakeholder teams.

Designed measurement plans and ran A/B-style experiments to validate optimizations, tracking KPIs that informed roadmap adjustments and continuous improvements across the feature portfolio while balancing customer value against technical effort and risk.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, embedding with the engineering squad to build an internal AI agent and restructure planning workflows that **cut planning cycle time 39%** and increased drill capacity by 21%.
microsoft_2023: Championed product adoption for AI-driven code-generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across **14 key teams** and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**, anticipating developer needs across the organization.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams to identify critical feature gaps and prioritize the highest-impact capabilities for delivery.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and transitioning documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and improving cross-team self-service.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions **28% faster** by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning **140+ teams**, balancing complexity, impact, and organizational strategy.

Mobilized a product strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, leading discovery with **20+ service teams** to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** to measure and monitor operational toil KPIs across 140+ teams, informing data-driven roadmap decisions.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process through day-to-day backlog management.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25%** and reducing manual release effort.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing transaction lifecycle for **200+ monthly proposals** via a new CRM process, improving customer experience.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and boosted conversions **2.7%** by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile through measurable experiments.
Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify and seal margin leaks, driving data-backed business decisions.
